hook: Centenarians often defy our expectations about health and longevity.

script.hook: Centenarians often defy our expectations about health and longevity.
beats: Many centenarians smoke or drink, and some are even overweight.
Research shows that genetics play a significant role in their longevity, sometimes more than lifestyle.
However, behaviors like regular exercise and managing stress still matter.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of centenarians engaging in various activities like smoking or enjoying a drink.
Graph showing the role of genetics versus lifestyle in longevity.
Footage of people exercising and practicing stress management techniques.
Text overlay summarizing key takeaways about longevity.
